prompt: A Korean young woman with the same unchanged face, pale soft complexion blown slightly by harsh 90s disposable-camera flash. Loose black hair falling forward as she leans toward a scratched bathroom mirror. Subtle knowing smirk. She’s wearing a soft faded peach tank top and loose cotton lounge pants. The mirror edges are chipped, toothpaste and skincare clutter visible on the sink. Flash reflection creates glare and lens flare. Grainy, raw, imperfect framing, authentic late-night candid energy.
